stories.title: CPSC Recall — VEVOR Baby Loungers (~237 Units)
stories.angle: Recall action guide — how to identify the product, the hazard, and how to get a refund.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: CPSC has recalled ~237 VEVOR baby loungers ($30). Two hazards: sides too low to contain an infant + foot openings too wide. Sold on Amazon, Wayfair, VEVOR.com. Stop use — cut the product in half and contact VEVOR for a full refund. #COSParenting #COSKids

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: If you have a VEVOR baby lounger, stop using it now. CPSC recall for non-compliance with mandatory infant sleep standards. Remedy: cut the cover, foam, and pad in half, then request your full refund from VEVOR directly. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings

article.headline: CPSC Recalls VEVOR Baby Loungers: What Colorado Springs Parents Need to Do Now

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
VEVOR Baby Lounger Recall

**Prompt:**
A soft, neutral-toned baby nursery setting with a lounger-style infant product in the center of the frame. The lounger is generic with no brand markings — simple cream fabric with minimal stitching detail. A gentle, cautionary mood — slightly desaturated colors suggesting concern without alarm. The bottom third of the image is a clean open floor area with soft natural light. Warm but muted color palette: soft whites, warm grays, and muted sage. Flat editorial art style with gentle depth of field. No people, no text, no logos.

**Dimensions:** 1080x1350 (X/FB)

stories.title: CPSC Recall — Target Gigglescape Under the Sea Popping Toy (~49,000 Units)
stories.angle: Recall action guide — especially relevant for families who bought this as a holiday gift.

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: RECALL: Target Gigglescape Under the Sea Popping Toy (~49,000 units). Dome detaches from whale base, releasing small plastic balls. Choking hazard — 9 reports of detachment, 1 child began to choke. Return to any Target for full refund. #COSParenting #COSKids

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: Got the Target Gigglescape whale toy? Check your toy bin now. The dome can detach and release small balls — a choking hazard. No receipt needed. Return to any Target store or request a prepaid label. $10 refund. #COSParenting #COSKids #ColoradoSprings

article.headline: Target Is Recalling the Gigglescape Under the Sea Popping Toy — Here's How to Get Your Refund

stories.title: D11 Free Summer Meals — Free Breakfast and Lunch for Kids Ages 1-18 in COS
stories.angle: Resource alert for COS families — how to find a nearby summer meal site.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text: FREE meals for COS kids this summer 🍽️ D11 is serving free breakfast and lunch Mon–Fri to any child ages 1-18 — no district residency required. Sites across Colorado Springs at schools, community centers, and playgrounds. #COSParenting #COSKids #ColoradoSprings

stories.title: Pikes Peak or Bust Rodeo — July 14-18 at Norris Penrose Event Center (Plus Parade July 11)
stories.angle: Family guide to one of COS's longest-running summer traditions (since 1937).

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text: Pikes Peak or Bust Rodeo is back — July 14-18 at Norris Penrose Event Center. Mutton Bustin' for kids ages 4-9 (under 50 lbs, no pre-registration). Pony rides, petting zoo, face painting. Free drone show July 16. Parade downtown July 11 at 11 AM. #PikesPeakParenting #COSParenting

article.headline: Your Family Guide to the Pikes Peak or Bust Rodeo: July 14-18 in Colorado Springs

stories.title: Aspen Acres Fire Update — 96,031 Acres, Flash Flood Watch, Monsoon Arrives
stories.angle: Fresh update for July 9 — distinct from yesterday's story (new acreage, flood watch, Fremont County status change, permit re-entry).

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: Aspen Acres Fire: 96,031 acres, 15% contained, 275 structures lost. Flash flood watch through tonight — fire-scarred soil + monsoon rains = serious runoff risk. Rockvale, Coal Creek, Williamsburg now in pre-evacuation. DAC issuing re-entry permits. #ColoradoSprings #COSParenting

article.headline: Aspen Acres Fire Reaches 96,031 Acres as Flash Flood Watch Goes Into Effect
